name: yomicast
title: Yomicast – Offline Japanese-English Dictionary
description: Offline Japanese-English dictionary. Instant search for kanji, kana, and English terms.
author: matchai

commands.name: ocr-translate
commands.title: Translate Japanese from Screen
commands.subtitle: Yomicast
commands.description: Recognize text from the screen with ScreenOCR and open it in Yomicast.

commands.name: update-dictionary
commands.title: Update Dictionary
commands.subtitle: Yomicast
commands.description: Update the dictionary with the latest Jitendex definitions.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
